articles.author: Michelle Del Rey
articles.title: Great American State Fair opens with power outages, empty booths - USA Today
articles.description: Trump's Great American State Fair on the National Mall opened with power outages and empty booths as many states skipped out on the event.
articles.content:
WASHINGTON The Great American State Fair is underway at the National Mall to mark the United States' 250th birthday. But not everything is off to such a great start.
The event has quickly faced prob… [+3821 chars]
